analysis.overall_assessment: The image shows two unhealthy tea leaves, indicating poor quality of the harvested crop.

immediate_actions: Remove unhealthy leaves from the batch
Inspect other batches for similar issues
Adjust harvesting techniques to prevent future occurrences of poor quality
processing_recommendations.sorting_strategy: Sort and separate healthy leaves from unhealthy ones before processing
processing_recommendations.processing_method: Process only the healthy leaves first, then discard or compost the unhealthy ones separately
quality_preservation: Ensure proper handling of remaining quality leaves to prevent contamination
Implement regular checks on leaf health during harvesting

waste_prevention.salvageable_portions: Healthy parts of the tea leaves can still be used for processing
alternative_uses: Use unhealthy leaves as compost material, or explore other uses such as animal feed
waste_prevention.composting_guidelines: Compost only healthy portions of the leaves separately from unhealthy ones
prevention_measures: Regularly inspect and monitor leaf quality during harvesting, adjust techniques as needed
Educate workers on proper handling of tea leaves to maintain quality

economic_impact.estimated_loss_percentage: The loss percentage will depend on the proportion of unhealthy leaves in the batch, but it could be significant if not addressed promptly
cost_saving_opportunities: Investing in better harvesting equipment or training for workers to reduce poor quality leaves
value_recovery_methods: Explore alternative uses for unhealthy leaves, such as composting or other industries that can utilize them

priority_actions: Adjust harvesting techniques to prevent future occurrences of poor quality
Invest in better equipment or training for workers
recommendations.timeline: Immediate actions should be taken within the next 24 hours, adjustments and investments can be made over the following weeks
monitoring_points: Regularly inspect leaf quality during harvesting, track improvements or declines in quality
